title: Sarcobodium lobbii

It belongs to the genus Sarcobodium, which is a relatively small and lesser-known group of orchids. intro: Sarcobium lobbii, also known as Lobb's starflower, is a plant species belonging to the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating various conditions such as wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive issues.
